---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - left=2.5cm
      - right=2.5cm
      - top=2.0cm
      - bottom=2.5cm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{graphicx}
        \usepackage{setspace}

execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
  cache: false

editor: visual
---

\begin{center}
\vspace*{-1cm}

\includegraphics[width=0.28\textwidth]{www/IEA_logo_2.png}

\vspace{1cm}

{\Large\bfseries Quarterly Macroeconomic Debt Report}

\vspace{0.3cm}

 

\textit{\today}

\vspace{1.2cm}
\end{center}

## Overview

This report presents the most recent quarterly estimates of Kenya’s public debt stock, expressed in Kenya Shillings (KSh billions).

```{r}

library(googlesheets4)
library(gargle) 
library(dplyr) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(readr) 
library(tidyr) 
library(purrr) 
library(stringr) 
library(forcats)  
library(rmarkdown)
library(jsonlite)

if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GSHEET_SERVICE_ACCOUNT"))) {
  # GitHub Actions / CI
  sa <- jsonlite::fromJSON(Sys.getenv("GSHEET_SERVICE_ACCOUNT"))
  gs4_auth(path = sa)
} else {
  # Local interactive session
  gs4_auth()
}


 



sheet_url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/11Y_EoYqFJOTTubbBCQkh1gV3kbX1cVQHapdzbwWUXK4"

raw <- read_sheet(ss = sheet_url,sheet = "Debt Stock", skip = 3) %>%
  filter(Indicator == "Total Public Debt (KSh bn)") %>%
  select(-Indicator,-`#`) %>%    # remove label before transpose
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Quarter") %>%
  rename(Value = V1) %>%
  mutate(Value = as.numeric(Value)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Value)) 
```

```{r}
raw %>%
knitr::kable()
```
